slides.headline:
See further.
Think faster.
slides.subline: A revolutionary camera system meets the most powerful chip we've ever built. The future is here.

slides.headline:
Power that
thinks with you.
slides.subline: 16-inch precision display. All-day battery. The laptop built for creators who refuse to compromise.

slides.headline:
Your health.
On your wrist.
slides.subline: Advanced health sensors, all-day tracking, and a design that turns heads. Life, measured beautifully.

products.name: Siraj S1 Ultra
products.description: 200MP adaptive camera. Titanium frame. Siraj Nexus chip. The most capable phone ever made.

products.name: Siraj Pro 16
products.description: Nexus M3 chip, mini-LED ProMotion display, up to 96GB unified memory. This is pro, redefined.

products.name: Siraj Tab Air
products.description: 12.9-inch Liquid OLED. Nexus chip. Optional keyboard & stylus.

products.name: Siraj Watch X
products.description: ECG, blood oxygen, crash detection, and 72-hour battery life.

products.name: Siraj Buds Pro
products.description: Adaptive ANC, spatial audio, and 36 hours total playback.

products.name: Siraj Care+
products.description: Accidental damage coverage, priority support, and same-day repair for all your Siraj devices.

items.text: Free delivery on all orders over $50.
Trade in your old device and save up to $600.

newsletter.headline: Stay ahead of the curve.
newsletter.subline: Be the first to hear about new products, exclusive offers, and technology that changes everything.
newsletter.disclaimer: No spam. Unsubscribe at any time.
newsletter.success: You're on the list. Welcome to the future.

footer.tagline: Innovative technology for a brighter tomorrow.

contactUs.headline: We'd love to hear from you.
contactUs.subline: Have a question? Want to know more about our products? Our team is here to help.
contactUs.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.

ourLocation.headline: Find us on the map.
ourLocation.subline: Stop by our flagship store and experience Siraj in person.

aboutUs.heroSubline: We believe technology should empower everyone. Since our founding, we've been dedicated to creating innovative products that transform how people connect, create, and live.
aboutUs.missionText: At Siraj, we design and build products that push the boundaries of what's possible. Our commitment to excellence drives us to combine cutting-edge technology with beautiful design, making advanced tech accessible to everyone.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We constantly push boundaries, exploring new technologies and approaches to create products that redefine expectations.

values.title: Quality
values.description: Every detail matters. From materials to software, we maintain uncompromising standards in everything we create.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: We're committed to reducing our environmental footprint through responsible sourcing, recyclable packaging, and energy-efficient design.

values.title: Community
values.description: We build more than products — we foster a global community of creators, thinkers, and dreamers who share our vision.

aboutUs.staffSubline: Our leadership team brings decades of combined experience in technology, design, and business to deliver products you love.
